title: Exact Complex Plane Transform Checks

solver_reuse.pressure: Exact real-pair replay computes i^2 = -1 + 0*i, while the malformed row claims the real part of every unit square is positive.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional complex-plane rows only when real-pair replay exposes a distinct exact-linear, polynomial, or rational-transform solver pressure; keep holomorphicity, residues, analytic continuation, and algebraic-closure theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode fixed complex-plane transform checks as deterministic real-pair NRA obligations.
Replay SAT witnesses through Axeyum model evaluation rather than pack-local Python only.
Keep the false unit-square real-part row tied to source-linked QF_LRA/Farkas evidence for the final exact real-part contradiction after real-pair replay.
Keep holomorphic, contour-integral, residue, analytic-continuation, and fundamental-theorem claims under Lean horizon until formal proof routes exist.
